# FMCG Deal Intelligence, 2026-07-16

27 verified deals this cycle.

### Unilever Grows Supplement Portfolio With Grüns Acquisition - Consumer Goods Technology
Unilever has acquired Grüns, a company specializing in dietary supplements, to expand its portfolio in the health and wellness segment. This acquisition is significant as it reflects Unilever's strategic focus on growing its presence in the supplement market, which is increasingly important in the FMCG sector.
_Source: Consumer Goods Technology · https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihgFBVV95cUxON3ZFQXlkQzFudXNRa1Q1MFdmNGFUNjlhNGtKMl9JWms2VTkxS21tckhzWWJDSDlrOXR6bWpLWnBfRVhzVW81bWhHX1Fla3hHdEN6OUNYSGlXbTJuNlc3d0NJMFlDZzFkMnQ3Wlo0d2FGMENPT1h6bXFNaUZaUjRYYWtoNTNYdw?oc=5_

### FMCG brand Mitra merges with Tierra Agrotech - ET Retail
FMCG brand Mitra has merged with Tierra Agrotech, a move aimed at enhancing their operational capabilities and market reach. This merger is noteworthy as it combines strengths in agriculture and consumer goods, potentially leading to innovative product offerings in the FMCG space.
_Source: ET Retail · https://news.google.?oc=5_

### FORM and Trax Retail's Image Recognition Merge to Create An Industry Leader in Retail Execution, Insight and Performance Across Consumer Goods and Retail Brands - Yahoo Finance
FORM and Trax Retail have merged to create a leading entity in retail execution and insights for consumer goods and retail brands. This merger is important for the FMCG sector as it enhances data-driven decision-making capabilities, which are crucial for competitive advantage.
_Source: Yahoo Finance · https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiiAFBVV95cUxNWG5rcEdaUUxVUTRJdk4xcTA0dGNwb2NDUzBqckpzbUxwalZORTYwWnJ0NkMzdldQeElUYkhkTzhoV21Fb0ItZnFvMFUtamlyMnh1NVByRkdfSTlYVUkzalU5X2pqc3FuTG5fbnNPLVZ4M1d6VzdUMS0xb1pRSklQeUtFQ00tRm9w?oc=5_

### Unilever agrees £11.9bn merger of its food business with US spice maker McCormick - This is Money
Unilever has reportedly agreed to a £11.9 billion merger of its food business with US spice maker McCormick. This deal is significant as it would create a major player in the food sector, potentially reshaping market dynamics and consumer choices.
_Source: This is Money · https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMizgFBVV95cUxNamtsT1kxbk5qcUN0M08tOWVGcnhvQVJuTEtGb2swTkN1bnBVZTZGVVdnVmo2RWpSbFF5ZGk4WXJiSFFpZEFpZzFyVkdsVnNENnpDV2hjaGRZeHV6aWR5YkVjU3JlbGhrR2NETkdBR2dtT3dOTUZoQTB5cW9YVWdYR1pFSXJuQmJUcC1RaDd2QnZEM002R1RDVi1lR0FtUnNKcEhpSWJoOXl5Ry1ody1lSmFYU3RtaXFocWotUk1Jb2xPdDJpSUxFbnE5b1FTZw?oc=5_

### Unilever and Kraft Heinz held talks over food merger uniting ketchup and mayo - Financial Times
Unilever and Kraft Heinz have held discussions regarding a potential merger that would unite their condiment brands, including ketchup and mayonnaise. This potential merger matters for the FMCG sector as it could lead to significant consolidation in the food industry, impacting pricing and product availability.
_Source: Financial Times · https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMihAFBVV95cUxNM1A1MzA3eGpHS2t3QnV4VWJLc3p5MUtIaTM0RmFLNmFNUzE3UVdINGhUQnBKeXA4dmZqZ1hHbWMwUlpDOGVTalRZZ2ZrekVpV1FfMWNCalBXTlh6MDZBWjl0WGNpa2lOQmgyaFRHRUZ3azRjM3RpelVDX0dfZ0UxeWZyeFQ?oc=5_

### McCormick acquires Unilever’s food business in US$45B deal - BNN Bloomberg
McCormick has acquired Unilever’s food business in a deal valued at $45 billion. This acquisition is pivotal as it consolidates McCormick's position as a leading player in the global flavor and seasoning market, which is critical for the FMCG industry.
_Source: BNN Bloomberg · https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiwwFBVV95cUxOdkRFS1B6eXdReGQ4YktSc053ZXM3aDZFdnI5R2JJUGdxai1YaWxqRXdrSk9Ha1lyMkEyeEM5QUdqdldvY2ExS1hiVk1tSHIweUx1Uk9haDRfcVZMVWR6bWtQR1JXZjJyd2VDOER6Z2Jva281c01pM09RRWdXU1ZITTlyek1HYWk4aFdMYWwtYXlnYnJsbmxyRjB5c2VndVdvWmhPbVdkcEs1YUtLSHBjMkMwTnpqSzZmUFNLY3g3RGZvSFk?oc=5_

### FMCG acquisitions boost scale with up to 10x growth, but not all bets pay off - Storyboard18
Recent FMCG acquisitions have shown potential for scale with growth up to 10 times, although not all investments yield positive results. This trend highlights the importance of strategic alignment in M&A activities within the FMCG sector.
_Source: Storyboard18 · https://news.google.?oc=5_

### VCs hit jackpot as FMCG giants go on D2C acquisition spree - The Economic Times
Venture capitalists have benefitted as FMCG giants pursue direct-to-consumer (D2C) acquisitions. This trend is significant as it underscores the shift towards D2C models in the FMCG sector, enabling brands to engage more directly with consumers.
_Source: The Economic Times · https://news.google.?oc=5_

### Competition Council authorises Pavăl Holding’s acquisition of Carrefour Romania - Business Review
The Competition Council has authorized Pavăl Holding’s acquisition of Carrefour Romania. This acquisition is important as it strengthens Pavăl Holding's position in the Romanian retail market, which could lead to enhanced competition and consumer choices.

### Danone expands in Australia with Made Group acquisition - Inside FMCG
Danone has expanded its presence in Australia by acquiring Made Group, a local food company. This acquisition is relevant as it allows Danone to tap into the growing demand for local and sustainable food products in the FMCG sector.

### FMCG firms turn selective in D2C acquisitions as profitability, data drive deal strategy - BusinessLine
FMCG firms are becoming more selective in their D2C acquisitions, focusing on profitability and data-driven strategies. This trend indicates a maturation in the FMCG sector, where companies are prioritizing sustainable growth over rapid expansion.
_Source: BusinessLine · https://news.google.?oc=5_

### Big Food gets leaner with divestitures and breakups as consumers turn away from packaged snacks - CNBC
Big Food companies are becoming leaner through divestitures and breakups as consumer preferences shift away from packaged snacks. This trend is important for the FMCG sector as it indicates a need for adaptation to changing consumer behaviors.
_Source: CNBC · https://news.google.?oc=5_
